power_strike.name: Power Strike
power_strike.description: A powerful physical attack dealing 1.5x damage

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: Attack all enemies for reduced damage

provoke.name: Provoke
provoke.description: Force an enemy to target you for 2 turns

raise.name: Raise
raise.description: Revive a fallen ally with 50% HP

protect.name: Protect
protect.description: Increase ally's defense by 50% for 3 turns

fire.name: Fire
fire.description: Fire magic damage to one enemy

fira.name: Fira
fira.description: Stronger fire magic damage to one enemy

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.description: Ice magic damage to one enemy

thunder.name: Thunder
thunder.description: Lightning magic damage to one enemy

steal.name: Steal
steal.description: Attempt to steal an item or gold from enemy

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.description: High damage attack with critical chance

mug.name: Mug
mug.description: Attack and steal in one action

edit_formula.name: Edit Formula
edit_formula.description: Temporarily modify a damage or healing formula for this battle

modify_constant.name: Modify Constant
modify_constant.description: Change a game constant (EXP rate, drop rate, etc.) - causes corruption!

analyze_code.name: Analyze Code
analyze_code.description: View the actual game code for current battle logic

create_autobattle_script.name: Create Autobattle Script
create_autobattle_script.description: Open the autobattle scripting interface mid-battle

rewind.name: Rewind
rewind.description: Rewind to previous save state (Time Mage only)

restore_point.name: Restore Point
restore_point.description: Create a restore point you can revert to

temporal_shield.name: Temporal Shield
temporal_shield.description: Protect party from next wipe by auto-rewinding

undo_death.name: Undo Death
undo_death.description: Undo a permanent death (requires Time Mage)

drain_life.name: Drain Life
drain_life.description: Steal HP from enemy and restore your own

death_sentence.name: Death Sentence
death_sentence.description: Enemy dies in 3 turns unless cleansed

corrupt_save.name: Corrupt Save
corrupt_save.description: Massively increase corruption for huge damage - DANGEROUS!

necro_blast.name: Necro Blast
necro_blast.description: Dark magic explosion hitting all enemies

permakill.name: Permakill
permakill.description: Kill enemy permanently - cannot be encountered again. HIGH RISK!

rat_swarm.name: Rat Swarm
rat_swarm.description: Summons 2 cave rats to aid in battle

filth_spray.name: Filth Spray
filth_spray.description: Sprays disgusting filth that damages and poisons all enemies

crown_authority.name: Crown Authority
crown_authority.description: The Rat King rallies all rat allies, boosting their attack

desperate_bite.name: Desperate Bite
desperate_bite.description: A powerful bite attack that deals double damage when below 30% HP

dive_attack.name: Dive Attack
dive_attack.description: Dive from above for increased damage

disease_cloud.name: Disease Cloud
disease_cloud.description: Release a cloud that poisons all enemies

royal_summon.name: Royal Summon
royal_summon.description: The Rat King summons his loyal rat guards to defend the throne
royal_summon.summon_message: The Rat King SQUEAKS imperiously! A Rat Guard answers the call!

default.name: Default
default.description: Take a defensive stance, halving damage and banking 1 BP

brave.name: Brave
brave.description: Spend stored BP to take extra actions this turn

guardian_wall.name: Guardian Wall
guardian_wall.description: Create a barrier that absorbs damage for all allies for 2 turns

last_stand_ability.name: Last Stand
last_stand_ability.description: Massive attack that deals more damage the lower your HP

smoke_bomb.name: Smoke Bomb
smoke_bomb.description: Throw a smoke bomb to guarantee escape or blind enemies for 2 turns

shadow_step.name: Shadow Step
shadow_step.description: Vanish into shadows, gaining evasion and guaranteeing next attack crits

quick_strike.name: Quick Strike
quick_strike.description: Lightning-fast attack that always goes first

throw_shuriken.name: Throw Shuriken
throw_shuriken.description: Throw shurikens at all enemies for speed-scaled damage

vanish.name: Vanish
vanish.description: Become completely invisible for 2 turns - cannot be targeted

summon_ifrit.name: Summon Ifrit
summon_ifrit.description: Summon the fire eidolon Ifrit to engulf all enemies in flames

summon_shiva.name: Summon Shiva
summon_shiva.description: Summon the ice queen Shiva to freeze all enemies

summon_ramuh.name: Summon Ramuh
summon_ramuh.description: Summon the storm elder Ramuh to strike all enemies with Judgment Bolt

summon_bahamut.name: Summon Bahamut
summon_bahamut.description: Summon the dragon king Bahamut for devastating Mega Flare

recursive_summon.name: Recursive Summon
recursive_summon.description: Summon another Summoner who summons another... (up to 3 deep). Exponential power!

mind_swap.name: Mind Swap
mind_swap.description: Swap control with target boss - you control it, AI controls you. If the boss wins, your save corrupts!

boss_puppet.name: Boss Puppet
boss_puppet.description: Force boss to use its weakest attack this turn

control_override.name: Control Override
control_override.description: Take full control of boss for 1 turn - choose its action

release_binding.name: Release Binding
release_binding.description: Break free from Mind Swap early, returning to normal control

mutual_destruction.name: Mutual Destruction
mutual_destruction.description: Kill both you and the bound boss instantly. Permanent. No takebacks.

warp_to_boss.name: Warp to Boss
warp_to_boss.description: Skip the dungeon and warp directly to the boss room. Missed loot!

skip_cutscene.name: Skip Cutscene
skip_cutscene.description: Skip any cutscene or dialogue. Miss the story, save the time.

bypass_puzzle.name: Bypass Puzzle
bypass_puzzle.description: Auto-solve any puzzle or environmental challenge

sequence_break.name: Sequence Break
sequence_break.description: Break intended game sequence to access later content early. May cause glitches!

new_game_plus_warp.name: NG+ Warp
new_game_plus_warp.description: Warp to any previously completed area with current stats and gear

leverage_position.name: Leverage Position
leverage_position.description: Set self local volatility to 2.0 for 3 turns. Recoil: take 10% max HP.

overexpose.name: Overexpose
overexpose.description: Set target local volatility to 2.0 for 3 turns, widening their damage variance.

hedge_position.name: Hedge Position
hedge_position.description: Set target local volatility to 0.5 for 3 turns, narrowing their damage variance.

press_the_edge.name: Press the Edge
press_the_edge.description: Consume 1 global band level for scaling damage. Higher band = more damage.

forecast.name: Forecast
forecast.description: Reveal volatility band status and tail event probability.

circuit_breaker.name: Circuit Breaker
circuit_breaker.description: Reduce global volatility band by 1, gain +1 AP.

battle_hymn.name: Battle Hymn
battle_hymn.description: A rousing war song that boosts all allies' attack by 25% for 3 turns

lullaby.name: Lullaby
lullaby.description: A soothing melody that has a 60% chance to put a single enemy to sleep for 2 turns

discord.name: Discord
discord.description: A dissonant chord that lowers all enemies' defense by 20% for 3 turns

inspiring_melody.name: Inspiring Melody
inspiring_melody.description: An uplifting tune that restores 5% max MP and grants +1 AP to all allies

masterite_proclamation.name: Masterite Proclamation
masterite_proclamation.description: The Masterite announces its purpose, steeling itself for the trial ahead.

masterite_endurance_test.name: Masterite Endurance Test
masterite_endurance_test.description: Tests the party's ability to endure sustained pressure

masterite_precise_strike.name: Masterite Precise Strike
masterite_precise_strike.description: A precisely measured strike targeting the weakest point

masterite_measured_blow.name: Masterite Measured Blow
masterite_measured_blow.description: Each strike is calibrated to test party coordination

masterite_counter_stance.name: Masterite Counter Stance
masterite_counter_stance.description: Assumes a counter-ready stance, building power

masterite_execution.name: Masterite Execution
masterite_execution.description: A final verdict delivered in a single devastating blow

masterite_slow.name: Masterite Slow
masterite_slow.description: Warps time around the target, slowing them to a crawl

masterite_quick_strike.name: Masterite Quick Strike
masterite_quick_strike.description: A rapid strike that lands before the opponent can react

masterite_mana_drain.name: Masterite Mana Drain
masterite_mana_drain.description: Drains magical energy from the target

masterite_resource_cut.name: Masterite Resource Cut
masterite_resource_cut.description: Reduces the target's magical output through systematic cuts

absence_pulse.name: Absence Pulse
absence_pulse.description: A shockwave of pure nothingness radiates outward, draining the will to exist.

absolute_zero.name: Absolute Zero
absolute_zero.description: Drops temperature to absolute zero, freezing all enemies solid.

absorb_meaning.name: Absorb Meaning
absorb_meaning.description: The Absence drinks in the significance of nearby things, reducing their effectiveness.

access_denied.name: Access Denied
access_denied.description: Blocks all incoming magic for one turn.

acid_splash.name: Acid Splash
acid_splash.description: Splashes corrosive acid that damages and reduces defense.

acid_spray.name: Acid Spray
acid_spray.description: Sprays corrosive acid across all enemies, lowering their defense.

adapt.name: Adapt
adapt.description: Learns from the last ability used against it and gains resistance.

armor_break.name: Armor Break
armor_break.description: A strike that shatters armor, massively reducing the target's defense.

assembly_slam.name: Assembly Slam
assembly_slam.description: A methodical overhead slam performed with factory precision.

bad_vibes.name: Bad Vibes
bad_vibes.description: Projects negative energy that lowers all stats slightly.

bark.name: Bark
bark.description: A thunderous bark that may frighten and reduce enemy attack.

base_case.name: Base Case
base_case.description: Terminates its own recursive loop, dealing moderate damage to all enemies.

bit_rot.name: Bit Rot
bit_rot.description: Corrupts the target's data integrity, causing ongoing degradation.

blizzard_breath.name: Blizzard Breath
blizzard_breath.description: Exhales a devastating blizzard that freezes all enemies.

bloat.name: Bloat
bloat.description: The Memory Leak grows larger, boosting its own attack and max HP.

blood_howl.name: Blood Howl
blood_howl.description: A bloodcurdling howl that drastically raises the alpha's attack.

boiler_burst.name: Boiler Burst
boiler_burst.description: Vents scalding steam from its boiler in a wide burst.

bone_throw.name: Bone Throw
bone_throw.description: Hurls a bone at high speed for moderate damage.

boulder_throw.name: Boulder Throw
boulder_throw.description: Hurls a massive boulder dealing heavy damage.

buffer_overflow.name: Buffer Overflow
buffer_overflow.description: Overloads the target's processing capacity, dealing chaotic damage.

burrow.name: Burrow
burrow.description: Digs underground, evading attacks for one turn and emerging to deal surprise damage.

call_manager.name: Call Manager
call_manager.description: Summons a manager to provide backup, buffing the user's stats.

call_stack.name: Call Stack
call_stack.description: Invokes its recursive call stack, dealing escalating damage with each layer.

cardinality_zero.name: Cardinality Zero
cardinality_zero.description: Reduces the effective size of a target's buff stack to zero.

cascade_failure.name: Cascade Failure
cascade_failure.description: Triggers a cascade of system failures that damages all enemies.

cease_existing.name: Cease Existing
cease_existing.description: Briefly phases out of existence, becoming untargetable for one turn.

chain_lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain_lightning.description: Lightning arcs between all enemies, dealing full damage to each.

chill.name: Chill
chill.description: A cold touch that reduces the target's speed.

chill_touch.name: Chill Touch
chill_touch.description: A spectral hand drains warmth and vitality from the target.

chomp.name: Chomp
chomp.description: The Mimic snaps its chest-lid shut on an enemy for heavy damage.

clipboard_smack.name: Clipboard Smack
clipboard_smack.description: Delivers a stinging smack with a metal clipboard.

clone_self.name: Clone Self
clone_self.description: Forks a copy of itself, creating an identical enemy.

coil.name: Coil
coil.description: Wraps tightly around a target, restricting movement and reducing their speed.

complaint.name: Complaint
complaint.description: Files a formal complaint that reduces the target's morale and attack.

complement.name: Complement
complement.description: Inverts a target's defense, turning it against them.

corrode.name: Corrode
corrode.description: Applies corrosive rust that eats away at defense over time.

corrupting_touch.name: Corrupting Touch
corrupting_touch.description: A touch that corrupts the target's data, applying a random debuff.

corruption_wave.name: Corruption Wave
corruption_wave.description: A wave of meta-corruption that damages all enemies and debuffs magic.

counter.name: Counter
counter.description: Reacts to an attack with a swift physical counter.

crystal_heal.name: Crystal Heal
crystal_heal.description: Channels crystal energy to restore HP.

crystal_shatter.name: Crystal Shatter
crystal_shatter.description: Shatters crystal shards in all directions for heavy damage.

crystal_slam.name: Crystal Slam
crystal_slam.description: Slams with a massive crystal fist.

cursed_strike.name: Cursed Strike
cursed_strike.description: A strike imbued with a curse that reduces the target's stats.

dark_bolt.name: Dark Bolt
dark_bolt.description: A bolt of dark energy fired at one enemy.

dark_matter.name: Dark Matter
dark_matter.description: Unleashes dark matter that crushes all enemies with gravitational force.

dark_slash.name: Dark Slash
dark_slash.description: A slash infused with dark energy that drains life.

data_absorb.name: Data Absorb
data_absorb.description: Absorbs raw data to restore its own HP.

data_corruption.name: Data Corruption
data_corruption.description: Corrupts the target's data, causing random effects.

data_drain.name: Data Drain
data_drain.description: Siphons data from the target, dealing damage and restoring MP.

deprecate.name: Deprecate
deprecate.description: Marks a target ability as deprecated, reducing its effectiveness.

dissolve.name: Dissolve
dissolve.description: Pours caustic fluid over the target, dealing heavy damage over time.

emergency_repair.name: Emergency Repair
emergency_repair.description: Runs an emergency self-repair protocol, restoring significant HP.

enrage.name: Enrage
enrage.description: Flies into a rage, massively boosting attack at the cost of defense.

existential_dread.name: Existential Dread
existential_dread.description: Confronts enemies with the meaninglessness of their existence, lowering all stats.

exploit_weakness.name: Exploit Weakness
exploit_weakness.description: Uses meta-knowledge to target the exact elemental weakness of an enemy.

fill_the_void.name: Fill the Void
fill_the_void.description: Absorbs incoming damage to restore its own HP.

final_compilation.name: Final Compilation
final_compilation.description: Compiles all its knowledge into one devastating final strike.

final_death.name: Final Death
final_death.description: Attempts to permanently erase a target from existence.

fire_breath.name: Fire Breath
fire_breath.description: Breathes a cone of fire that scorches all enemies.

flame_wall.name: Flame Wall
flame_wall.description: Raises a wall of flame that burns all who approach.

fork_bomb.name: Fork Bomb
fork_bomb.description: Spawns exponentially multiplying processes that crash the battlefield.

fourth_wall_break.name: Fourth Wall Break
fourth_wall_break.description: Shatters the fourth wall, dealing damage that ignores all resistances.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: Enters a blood frenzy, greatly boosting attack speed and power.

frost_armor.name: Frost Armor
frost_armor.description: Encases itself in frost, raising defense and damaging attackers.

future_sight.name: Future Sight
future_sight.description: Reads the future to counter the next action perfectly.

garbage_collect.name: Garbage Collect
garbage_collect.description: Clears all status effects from itself.

garbage_collect_all.name: Garbage Collect All
garbage_collect_all.description: Forcibly removes all buffs from all enemies.

gear_barrage.name: Gear Barrage
gear_barrage.description: Launches a storm of razor-edged cogs at all enemies.

gear_slam.name: Gear Slam
gear_slam.description: Slams with a massive gear, dealing heavy physical damage.

gem_shatter.name: Gem Shatter
gem_shatter.description: Shatters crystal gems in all directions, hitting all enemies.

glitch_bolt.name: Glitch Bolt
glitch_bolt.description: Fires a bolt of corrupted data that deals erratic damage.

glitch_strike.name: Glitch Strike
glitch_strike.description: A strike that skips through reality, ignoring evasion.

gold_scatter.name: Gold Scatter
gold_scatter.description: Scatters gold coins at high velocity, hitting all enemies.

grind_rail.name: Grind Rail
grind_rail.description: Slides into all enemies on an imaginary rail, dealing damage.

ground_pound.name: Ground Pound
ground_pound.description: Leaps and slams the ground, hitting all enemies with shockwave.

hallucination_spores.name: Hallucination Spores
hallucination_spores.description: Releases hallucinogenic spores that confuse all enemies.

heap_overflow.name: Heap Overflow
heap_overflow.description: Overflows the target's memory heap, causing system damage.

hollow_echo.name: Hollow Echo
hollow_echo.description: Sends an echo of emptiness that reduces all enemy stats.

horn_charge.name: Horn Charge
horn_charge.description: Charges with lowered horn for devastating impact.

howl.name: Howl
howl.description: A fearsome howl that raises own attack and may frighten enemies.

ice_breath.name: Ice Breath
ice_breath.description: Exhales a freezing blizzard that chills all enemies.

ice_prison.name: Ice Prison
ice_prison.description: Encases a single enemy in ice, freezing them solid.

inferno_rage.name: Inferno Rage
inferno_rage.description: Ignites into an inferno of fury, massively boosting fire attacks.

infinite_loop.name: Infinite Loop
infinite_loop.description: Traps a target in an infinite loop, stunning them for multiple turns.

infinite_regress.name: Infinite Regress
infinite_regress.description: Calls itself recursively, dealing increasing damage with each call.

intersection_null.name: Intersection Null
intersection_null.description: Finds the null intersection of all buffs and removes them.

iron_guard.name: Iron Guard
iron_guard.description: Raises an iron guard, greatly increasing defense.

kickflip.name: Kickflip
kickflip.description: Executes a radical kickflip, striking with the board's edge.

lid_slam.name: Lid Slam
lid_slam.description: Slams its lid down on an enemy with tremendous force.

life_drain.name: Life Drain
life_drain.description: Drains the life force from a target, healing self.

lightning_dash.name: Lightning Dash
lightning_dash.description: Dashes through all enemies at lightning speed.

lure.name: Lure
lure.description: Poses as a treasure chest again, taunting a target to attack.

magic_reflect.name: Magic Reflect
magic_reflect.description: Erects a barrier that reflects magic spells back at the caster.

magma_eruption.name: Magma Eruption
magma_eruption.description: Triggers a volcanic eruption of magma beneath all enemies.

mandatory_overtime.name: Mandatory Overtime
mandatory_overtime.description: Motivates all allies through threats of overtime, boosting attack.

memory_drain.name: Memory Drain
memory_drain.description: Drains memories and MP from all enemies.

memory_leak.name: Memory Leak
memory_leak.description: Causes the target to slowly leak memory and HP each turn.

mimic_ability.name: Mimic Ability
mimic_ability.description: Copies the last ability used by a party member and uses it.

null_field.name: Null Field
null_field.description: Creates a field of nullity that suppresses all abilities for one turn.

null_pointer.name: Null Pointer
null_pointer.description: Dereferences a null pointer, dealing catastrophic damage.

null_reference.name: Null Reference
null_reference.description: Instantiates a null reference exception that damages all enemies.

null_touch.name: Null Touch
null_touch.description: A touch that erases the target's existence temporarily.

ollie_slam.name: Ollie Slam
ollie_slam.description: Launches up and crashes down on an enemy with full momentum.

optimize_away.name: Optimize Away
optimize_away.description: Removes all buffs from a target as unnecessary overhead.

overcharge.name: Overcharge
overcharge.description: Overcharges its body with electricity, boosting attack and speed.

overflow.name: Overflow
overflow.description: Overflows its own value to deal chaotic damage.

oxidize.name: Oxidize
oxidize.description: Oxidizes the target, massively reducing defense over time.

pack_call.name: Pack Call
pack_call.description: Calls wolves from the pack to join the battle.

packet_filter.name: Packet Filter
packet_filter.description: Filters incoming damage, reducing all damage taken for 2 turns.

peace_sign.name: Peace Sign
peace_sign.description: Flashes a peace sign that may pacify enemies.

peck.name: Peck
peck.description: A sharp, fast peck with an ornery beak.

performance_review.name: Performance Review
performance_review.description: Issues a scathing performance review that lowers all enemy stats.

permakill_strike.name: Permakill Strike
permakill_strike.description: A devastating strike that threatens permanent character death.

phantom_byte.name: Phantom Byte
phantom_byte.description: Fires a spectral byte that phases through defenses.

phantom_wail.name: Phantom Wail
phantom_wail.description: Unleashes a spectral wail that terrifies all enemies.

piston_punch.name: Piston Punch
piston_punch.description: Drives a pneumatic piston fist into the target.

pixel_storm.name: Pixel Storm
pixel_storm.description: Unleashes a storm of corrupted pixels that hits all enemies.

player_knowledge.name: Player Knowledge
player_knowledge.description: Uses knowledge of the player's strategies to deal targeted damage.

poison_touch.name: Poison Touch
poison_touch.description: A touch that always poisons the target.

port_block.name: Port Block
port_block.description: Blocks a port of attack, reflecting the next physical hit.

prismatic_reflect.name: Prismatic Reflect
prismatic_reflect.description: Reflects magic at a random target, friend or foe.

process_spike.name: Process Spike
process_spike.description: A sudden spike of processing power concentrated into a strike.

puppy_eyes.name: Puppy Eyes
puppy_eyes.description: Stares with adorable puppy eyes, potentially charming an enemy.

rattle.name: Rattle
rattle.description: Rattles its bones unsettlingly, lowering enemy attack.

reassign.name: Reassign
reassign.description: Reassigns its own value, randomly altering its stats.

reconstruct.name: Reconstruct
reconstruct.description: Reconstructs its crystalline form, restoring a significant amount of HP.

recursive_strike.name: Recursive Strike
recursive_strike.description: Strikes repeatedly, calling itself again with each hit.

reduce_overhead.name: Reduce Overhead
reduce_overhead.description: Strips all buffs from a party member to improve its own performance.

reflect_shield.name: Reflect Shield
reflect_shield.description: Raises an enchanted shield that reflects magic back at casters.

regenerate.name: Regenerate
regenerate.description: Regrows damaged tissue, restoring HP each turn for 3 turns.

remove_element.name: Remove Element
remove_element.description: Removes a random buff or positive effect from the target.

rending_bite.name: Rending Bite
rending_bite.description: A savage bite that tears through armor, reducing defense.

repetitive_strike.name: Repetitive Strike
repetitive_strike.description: Performs the same factory-programmed strike repeatedly.

rewind_turn.name: Rewind Turn
rewind_turn.description: Rewinds the current turn, undoing all actions taken this round.

root_bind.name: Root Bind
root_bind.description: Erupts roots from the ground to bind and damage an enemy.

rules_lawyer.name: Rules Lawyer
rules_lawyer.description: Invokes obscure rules that negate the last ability used against it.

sabotage.name: Sabotage
sabotage.description: Sabotages equipment, reducing a target's attack and speed.

sand_strike.name: Sand Strike
sand_strike.description: Erupts from the sand in a surprise strike that may blind.

sandstorm.name: Sandstorm
sandstorm.description: Whips up a blinding sandstorm that hits all enemies and may blind.

save_deletion.name: Save Deletion
save_deletion.description: Attempts to delete the player's save file. Catastrophic if successful.

scalding_mist.name: Scalding Mist
scalding_mist.description: Releases superheated steam that burns all enemies.

security_audit.name: Security Audit
security_audit.description: Audits all enemies, exposing their vulnerabilities and reducing defense.

segfault_slash.name: Segfault Slash
segfault_slash.description: A slash that accesses forbidden memory, dealing massive damage.

shadow_bind.name: Shadow Bind
shadow_bind.description: Binds an enemy in living shadows, preventing movement.

shell_guard.name: Shell Guard
shell_guard.description: Retreats into its shell, massively boosting defense for one turn.

shrapnel_burst.name: Shrapnel Burst
shrapnel_burst.description: Explodes outward sending shrapnel into all enemies.

slam.name: Slam
slam.description: A powerful slam attack that deals heavy physical damage.

smash.name: Smash
smash.description: A bone-crushing smash that deals significant damage.

soul_drain.name: Soul Drain
soul_drain.description: Drains the life force from a target, dealing damage and restoring HP.

soul_reap.name: Soul Reap
soul_reap.description: Harvests the soul of a target, dealing massive dark damage.

soul_wail.name: Soul Wail
soul_wail.description: Releases a piercing wail that lowers all enemy magic defense.

spectral_touch.name: Spectral Touch
spectral_touch.description: A ghostly touch that chills the soul, dealing dark damage.

spore_cloud.name: Spore Cloud
spore_cloud.description: Releases a cloud of toxic spores that poison all enemies.

stack_overflow.name: Stack Overflow
stack_overflow.description: Overflows the call stack, causing catastrophic damage to all enemies.

stack_smash.name: Stack Smash
stack_smash.description: Smashes through the target's stack of defenses.

static_field.name: Static Field
static_field.description: Creates a static electric field that shocks all enemies each turn.

steam_vent.name: Steam Vent
steam_vent.description: Vents scalding steam from pneumatic pistons at an enemy.

streamline.name: Streamline
streamline.description: Optimizes its attack routines, boosting both attack and speed.

subset_drain.name: Subset Drain
subset_drain.description: Drains a subset of the target's strength, reducing magic and attack.

system_crash.name: System Crash
system_crash.description: Crashes the entire battlefield system, dealing heavy damage to all enemies.

tail_sweep.name: Tail Sweep
tail_sweep.description: Sweeps its massive tail across all enemies.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.description: Taunts an enemy, forcing them to target you next turn.

temporal_strike.name: Temporal Strike
temporal_strike.description: A strike that exists in multiple time states simultaneously.

tetanus_touch.name: Tetanus Touch
tetanus_touch.description: Infects with rusty bacteria, causing lingering poison damage.

thread_slash.name: Thread Slash
thread_slash.description: Slashes with a computational thread, hitting multiple times.

thrown_newspaper.name: Thrown Newspaper
thrown_newspaper.description: Hurls a rolled-up newspaper with surprising force.

thunder_breath.name: Thunder Breath
thunder_breath.description: Breathes a devastating bolt of lightning at all enemies.

time_stop.name: Time Stop
time_stop.description: Stops time for all enemies for 2 turns.

toxic_cloud.name: Toxic Cloud
toxic_cloud.description: Releases a dense toxic cloud that poisons all enemies.

toxic_embrace.name: Toxic Embrace
toxic_embrace.description: Engulfs the target in toxic sludge, poisoning and slowing.

type_error.name: Type Error
type_error.description: Applies a type error to the target, causing random damage.

undefine.name: Undefine
undefine.description: Removes the target from definition, stripping all their buffs.

venomous_bite.name: Venomous Bite
venomous_bite.description: A bite loaded with potent venom that always poisons.

void_breath.name: Void Breath
void_breath.description: Breathes the void itself, erasing all that it touches.

void_pulse.name: Void Pulse
void_pulse.description: Emits a pulse of void energy that damages and silences.

voltage_surge.name: Voltage Surge
voltage_surge.description: Surges with excess voltage, shocking all nearby enemies.

web_shot.name: Web Shot
web_shot.description: Shoots a sticky web that slows and may bind an enemy.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.description: Spins into a whirlwind of cogs and debris, hitting all enemies.

wrench_throw.name: Wrench Throw
wrench_throw.description: Hurls a heavy wrench for reliable damage.
